name: Karmarts Public Company Limited
summary: Karmarts Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiary, engages in the manufacturing, packaging, import, and distribution of cosmetics and consumer products in Thailand. It operates through two segments, Manufacture and Distribution of Consumer Products; and Warehouse Rental and Warehouse Service. The company offers facial care and cleanser, body care and cleanser, makeup, beauty accessories, hair care, dietary supplement, scented, acne and sensitive skin care, and oral care products under the Cathy Doll, Baby Bright, Boya, Jejuvita, Reunrom, Crayon, Cathy Choo, and SKYNLAB brands. It distributes products through convenience stores; supermarkets/hypermarkets, and discount stores; and specialty stores, as well as through catalogs and online. The company operates 48 shops under the KARMART brand. It also exports its products to Singapore, Cambodia, Vietnam, Myanmar, China, Laos, Indonesia, the Philippines, the United Arab Emirates, Malaysia, Taiwan, Iraq, the United States, Hong Kong, Russia, and India. The company was formerly known as Distar Electric Corporation Public Company Limited and changed its name to Karmarts Public Company Limited in April 2011. Karmarts Public Company Limited was incorporated in 1982 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
